raw_consumer_statement: I booked a hotel room by phone with company called XXXX XXXX XXXX in the amount of {$780.00}. At the time of booking I specifically ask. # 1 was it refundable. I had a medical procedure scheduled that could be cancelled. I was told yes just let us know as soon as possible. # 2 was there a shuttle. I was told yes. # 3 was I receiving the XXXX XXXX  rate. I was told yes. I booked the room confirmation came back no cancellation no shuttle. I contacted the merchant and I was told no refund. I contacted Barclays to file a dispute. I have their AA Advantage Master Card. XX/XX/year> I received confirmation of the dispute. XX/XX/year> I received a provisional credit. XXXX a denial of my dispute due to merchant has not violated terms of contract. I do not believe Barclays read my appeal and summarily dismissed. I was given false information. I would have never booked with them if i was provided the information in the confirmation. In addition i also informed Barclays when i filed the dispute the merchant cancelled the hotel room that was paid for. My procedure is still scheduled and i had to book another room same hotel same dates.
